questions.question: How should rows with missing sex values be handled in any later stratified analysis involving sex?
questions.why_it_matters: The dataset includes missing values in sex, so a preprocessing choice may affect grouped summaries or tests that use this variable.

questions.question: Should analyses that involve numeric variables use complete-case handling for the rows with missing numeric entries, or should another preprocessing rule be applied first?
questions.why_it_matters: Several numeric columns have missing values, so the analysis rule can affect which rows enter later tests.
